mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS id, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN ( SELECT u.nickname FROM conversation_member cm2 INNER JOIN user u ON cm2.user_id = u.id WHERE cm2.conversation_id = c.id AND cm2.user_id != #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 ) ELSE c.name END AS name, c.type AS type, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN ( SELECT u.avatar FROM conversation_member cm2 INNER JOIN user u ON cm2.user_id = u.id WHERE cm2.conversation_id = c.id AND cm2.user_id != #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 ) ELSE c.avatar END AS avatar, c.owner_id AS ownerId, c.last_message AS lastMessage, c.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, c.last_message_type AS lastMessageType, c.member_count AS memberCount, c.dissolved AS dissolved, cm.unread_count AS unreadCount, cm.last_read_at AS lastReadAt, cm.muted AS muted, cm.pinned AS pinned, c.created_at AS createdAt, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN ( SELECT cm2.user_id FROM conversation_member cm2 WHERE cm2.conversation_id = c.id AND cm2.user_id != #{userId} LIMIT 1 ) ELSE NULL END AS peerId, CASE WHEN c.type = 1 THEN ( SELECT u.status FROM conversation_member cm2 INNER JOIN user u ON cm2.user_id = u.id WHERE cm2.conversation_id = c.id AND cm2.user_id != #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 ) ELSE NULL END AS peerStatus, cm.role AS myRole FROM conversation c INNER JOIN conversation_member cm ON c.id = cm.conversation_id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND c.deleted = 0 AND cm.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC, c.updated_at DESC

SELECT c.* FROM conversation c WHERE c.type = 1 AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.id IN ( SELECT conversation_id FROM conversation_member WHERE user_id = #{userA} AND deleted = 0 ) AND c.id IN ( SELECT conversation_id FROM conversation_member WHERE user_id = #{userB} AND deleted = 0 ) LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id AS id, c.name AS name, c.type AS type, c.avatar AS avatar, c.owner_id AS ownerId, c.last_message AS lastMessage, c.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, c.last_message_type AS lastMessageType, c.member_count AS memberCount, c.dissolved AS dissolved, cm.unread_count AS unreadCount, cm.last_read_at AS lastReadAt, cm.muted AS muted, cm.pinned AS pinned, c.created_at AS createdAt, cm.role AS myRole FROM conversation c INNER JOIN group_member gm ON c.id = gm.conversation_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId} AND gm.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN conversation_member cm ON c.id = cm.conversation_id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.deleted = 0 WHERE c.type = 2 AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.dissolved = 0 ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC, c.updated_at DESC
